scenarios.description: Terastallization retains 1.5× STAB for base types — Fire/Flying Charizard with Fire Tera still gets 1.5× on Flying moves (ERRATA #30)
scenarios.note: Tera STAB rule: original types keep 1.5× STAB after Terastallization. Source: smogon/pokemon-showdown sim/battle-actions.ts ERRATA #30

scenarios.description: If Tera type differs from original types, Tera type STAB = 1.5×
scenarios.note: Tera type (Dragon) is not original type — provides 1.5× STAB. Source: smogon/pokemon-showdown sim/battle-actions.ts

scenarios.description: If Tera type matches an original type, Tera type STAB = 2.0×
scenarios.note: Tera type (Fire) matches original type — provides 2.0× STAB. Source: smogon/pokemon-showdown sim/battle-actions.ts

scenarios.description: Adaptability + Tera: base type STAB = 2.0×, Tera type STAB = 2.25× (NOT 3×/4× — ERRATA #26)
scenarios.note: Adaptability with Tera: base type = 2.0×, Tera match = 2.25×. Source: smogon/pokemon-showdown sim/battle-actions.ts ERRATA #26

scenarios.description: Libero/Protean in Gen 9 activates only once per switch-in (ERRATA #23)
scenarios.note: Libero/Protean Gen 9: restricted to once per switch-in. Gen 8 activated every move. Source: smogon/pokemon-showdown data/abilities.ts ERRATA #23

scenarios.description: Stellar Tera type provides a one-time 2× boost per move type; Tera Blast with Stellar = 100 BP + -1 Atk/SpA after use
scenarios.note: Stellar Tera: one-time 2× per type used; Tera Blast 100 BP and lowers own Atk/SpA. Source: smogon/pokemon-showdown data/moves.ts

scenarios.description: Salt Cure deals 1/4 max HP per turn to Water or Steel types (1/8 otherwise)
scenarios.note: Salt Cure: 1/4 HP per turn for Water/Steel targets; 1/8 for others. Source: smogon/pokemon-showdown data/moves.ts SaltCure

scenarios.description: Supreme Overlord boosts Attack and Sp. Atk by 10% per fainted ally (max 50% at 5 fainted)
scenarios.note: Supreme Overlord: +10% Atk and SpAtk per fainted ally. 3 fainted = 1.3×. Source: smogon/pokemon-showdown data/abilities.ts SupremeOverlord

scenarios.description: Protosynthesis boosts Speed by 50% in Sun (other stats get 30% — ERRATA #28)
scenarios.note: Protosynthesis: Speed gets 50% boost, other stats get 30% in Sun. Source: smogon/pokemon-showdown data/abilities.ts ERRATA #28

scenarios.description: Protosynthesis boosts non-Speed highest stat by 30% in Sun (ERRATA #28)
scenarios.note: Protosynthesis: non-Speed highest stat gets 30% boost in Sun. Source: smogon/pokemon-showdown data/abilities.ts ERRATA #28

scenarios.description: Quark Drive works like Protosynthesis but activates in Electric Terrain instead of Sun (ERRATA #28)
scenarios.note: Quark Drive: Speed 50%, other stats 30% in Electric Terrain. Source: smogon/pokemon-showdown data/abilities.ts ERRATA #28

scenarios.description: Electric Terrain boosts Electric moves by 1.3x in Gen 9 (NOT 1.5x — that was Gen 7 — ERRATA #17)
scenarios.note: Electric Terrain multiplier is 1.3× in Gen 8+. Was 1.5× in Gen 7. Source: smogon/pokemon-showdown sim/battle-actions.ts ERRATA #17

scenarios.description: Orichalcum Pulse sets Sun on entry and boosts Attack by 33% in Sun; does NOT change move type (ERRATA #29)
scenarios.note: Orichalcum Pulse: Drought-like on entry + 33% Atk boost in Sun. Does not retype moves. Source: smogon/pokemon-showdown data/abilities.ts ERRATA #29

scenarios.description: Hadron Engine sets Electric Terrain on entry and boosts Sp. Atk; does NOT change move type (ERRATA #29)
scenarios.note: Hadron Engine: Electric Terrain on entry + 33% SpAtk boost. Does not retype moves. Source: smogon/pokemon-showdown data/abilities.ts ERRATA #29

scenarios.description: Snow replaces Hail in Gen 9: no residual chip damage to non-Ice types
scenarios.note: Gen 9 Snow: no end-of-turn damage (unlike Hail). Source: smogon/pokemon-showdown sim/battle-actions.ts

scenarios.description: Ice-type Pokemon gain +50% Defense in Snow weather in Gen 9
scenarios.note: Gen 9 Snow: Ice types gain 50% Defense boost. Source: smogon/pokemon-showdown data/abilities.ts

scenarios.description: Purifying Salt grants full immunity to all status conditions
scenarios.note: Purifying Salt: immune to all status conditions. Source: smogon/pokemon-showdown data/abilities.ts PurifyingSalt

scenarios.description: Purifying Salt halves Ghost-type damage received
scenarios.note: Purifying Salt: 0.5× modifier on Ghost-type damage. Source: smogon/pokemon-showdown data/abilities.ts PurifyingSalt

scenarios.description: Terastallization persists for the remainder of the battle after activation (like Mega Evolution)
scenarios.note: Once Terastallized, a Pokemon stays in that Tera form for the rest of the battle. Source: smogon/pokemon-showdown sim/battle-actions.ts

scenarios.description: Gholdengo's Make It Rain lowers the user's Sp. Atk by 1 stage after use
scenarios.note: Make It Rain: Steel-type multi-target special move; -1 SpAtk to user after use. Source: smogon/pokemon-showdown data/moves.ts MakeItRain

scenarios.description: Terastal Charizard (Fire Tera): 2.0× STAB on Fire moves, 1.5× STAB on Flying moves

cases.note: Tera type matches original type → 2.0× STAB

scenarios.note: Tera Charizard (Fire): Fire = 2.0× STAB (Tera match), Flying = 1.5× STAB (original retained). Source: smogon/pokemon-showdown sim/battle-actions.ts ERRATA #30

scenarios.description: Weather duration in Gen 9 remains 5 turns base (unchanged from Gen 6)
scenarios.note: Weather base duration: 5 turns. Heat Rock/Damp Rock etc extend. Source: smogon/pokemon-showdown sim/battle-actions.ts
